audit_items.proof_trace: The sole path that adds an asset to eligibleAssets is the `else if (isPriceValid)` branch at line 255; eligibleAssetsIdx is incremented only at line 264, which is nested inside that branch. Additionally, if the asset-out price is invalid, lines 271-273 reset eligibleAssetsIdx to 0, clearing all candidates. _getAssetPrice returns isValid = !isZero && !isStale regardless of withValidation, so both stale and zero prices are correctly disqualified.
